steps.title: Find the main verb
steps.content: The subject is plural: emulsifiers such as stearyl alcohol. The blank must provide a finite verb that agrees with that subject and fits the passive meaning: emulsifiers are used to blend oil and water.

steps.title: Reject fragments
steps.content: Choice A is only a past participle. Choice B is a participial phrase. Choice D creates a relative-clause construction and does not supply the needed main predicate. The answer is C.
